question: Which event happened first, the road trip to the coast or the arrival of the new prime lens?
ground_truth_answer: The arrival of the new prime lens

retrieval_results.context:
User went on a road trip to the coast with friends last week.
User took amazing shots of cliffs and beaches on the coastal road trip.
User spent three days driving along the coastal highway.
User took photos at scenic overlooks during the coastal highway trip.
User stopped at scenic overlooks during the coastal highway trip.
